mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rides (rider_id, driver_id, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, dropoff_lat, dropoff_lng, status, estimated_fare) VALUES ( #{riderId}::uuid, #{driverId}::uuid NULL, #{pickupLat}, #{pickupLng}, #{dropoffLat}, #{dropoffLng}, #{status}, #{estimatedFare} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, rider_id, driver_id, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, dropoff_lat, dropoff_lng, status, estimated_fare, final_fare, started_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM rides WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.update: UPDATE rides SET status = #{status}, cancelled_at = #{cancelledAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
UPDATE rides SET driver_id = #{driverId}::uuid, status = #{status}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
UPDATE rides SET final_fare = #{finalFare}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.select:
SELECT dl.driver_id, dl.latitude, dl.longitude, dl.created_at FROM driver_locations dl INNER JOIN ( SELECT driver_id, MAX(created_at) AS max_created FROM driver_locations GROUP BY driver_id ) latest ON dl.driver_id = latest.driver_id AND dl.created_at = latest.max_created INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = dl.driver_id AND u.driver_status = 'AVAILABLE' WHERE (6371 * acos( cos(radians(#{pickupLat})) * cos(radians(dl.latitude)) * cos(radians(dl.longitude) - radians(#{pickupLng})) + sin(radians(#{pickupLat})) * sin(radians(dl.latitude)) )) <= #{radiusKm}
AND dl.driver_id NOT IN
#{did}::uuid
ORDER BY (6371 * acos( cos(radians(#{pickupLat})) * cos(radians(dl.latitude)) * cos(radians(dl.longitude) - radians(#{pickupLng})) + sin(radians(#{pickupLat})) * sin(radians(dl.latitude)) )) ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE rides SET status = #{status}, started_at = #{startedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, final_fare = #{finalFare}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.select: SELECT id, rider_id, driver_id, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, dropoff_lat, dropoff_lng, status, estimated_fare, final_fare, started_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM rides WHERE driver_id = #{driverId}::uuid AND status = 'MATCHED' LIMIT 1
